# NRI Institute of Technology (NRIIT)

> Unified digital campus for NRI Institute of Technology — connecting students, faculty, and departments across Engineering, Research, and campus life.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of NRIIT and its programs.
- [About](/about): Vision, mission, and history of NRIIT.
- [Branches](/branches): Departments including CSE, IT, and Data Science.
- [Courses](/courses): Undergraduate and postgraduate programs offered.
- [Research](/research): Faculty and student research projects and innovations.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming campus events, workshops, and conferences.

## Optional

- [Login](/auth): Sign in for students, faculty, and administrators.
